title: Advisor Coverage Taxonomy — structured dimension model for scout swarms
what: Each advisor owns a coverage_taxonomy.yaml that defines its watchable dimensions, the target number of scouts per dimension, which scouts currently fill each slot, and a coverage_score. Scouts are meant to swarm — multiple scouts per dimension probe from different angles (broad sweep, threshold alert, trend, quality). An advisor with <80% coverage on any P1 dimension is under-instrumented.
why: Without a taxonomy, advisors accumulate scouts randomly. Dense coverage of easy dimensions, blind spots in critical ones. The taxonomy makes gaps visible to Ozi, Wilbur, and the advisor itself — enabling predictable expansion and budget allocation.

scout_angle_types.broad_sweep: Finds anything wrong in this dimension — wide net, any signal
scout_angle_types.threshold: Alerts only when a count or age crosses a defined limit
scout_angle_types.trend: Detects whether this dimension has been getting worse over time
scout_angle_types.quality: Checks structural soundness, not just presence (exists vs. is good)

schema.overall_coverage_score: float — fraction of dimension slots filled

dimensions.label: string — human display name
dimensions.description: string — what gap this dimension detects
dimensions.target_scouts: int — how many scouts this dimension should have when fully instrumented
dimensions.gap_risk: low|medium|high — consequence of this dimension being under-covered

coverage_rules.p1_minimum: All P1 dimensions must reach coverage_score >= 0.75 before advisor is considered production-ready
coverage_rules.swarm_minimum: Any dimension with target_scouts >= 3 must have at least 2 non-gap scouts or it fails Ozi's coverage gate
coverage_rules.gap_scout_creation: Gap scouts are created by the advisor during reflection or by Ozi init — they go to scouts/spoke_local/draft/ with status=gap cleared to status=draft
coverage_rules.promotion_path: draft → ready requires 7 days minimum + all required fields present (enforced by scout-vera-lifecycle-draft-scout-stale-v1)
